hero.sub: I'm Zillur — I edit, animate, and composite visuals that make stories move. From color grading to full VFX pipelines, for commercials, music videos, and short films.

about.bio: [ Add 2-3 sentences about your background — how you got into editing/motion/VFX, the tools you use (Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Blender...), and the kind of projects you love working on. ]

work.sub: Every project starts with a story. Whether it's a brand film, a music video, or a short — the edit is where it either comes alive or falls flat.

items.title: AI Video Generation
items.description: Full AI-generated shots and scenes built from prompts, references, and storyboards.

items.title: AI Video Fixes
items.description: Cleaning up warping, flicker, and artifacts from AI-generated footage so it holds up.

items.title: Video Editing
items.description: Cutting raw footage into a paced, structured story — from rough cut to final grade.

items.title: Screen Comp
items.description: Compositing screen inserts and replacements into live-action footage.

items.title: Keying
items.description: Clean green/blue-screen keying for compositing talent into any background.

items.title: Cleanups
items.description: Removing rigs, wires, blemishes, and unwanted objects from a shot.

items.a: Video editing, motion graphics, VFX compositing, and color grading — for commercials, music videos, short films, and social content.
